attribution: PRE-EXISTING replay-path instability at the trunk-0.9.0 BASE on this (66,159) case — the UNMERGED base blows up at the same hour with the same dynamics-first signature. The consolidation is physics-only (ZERO dynamics/boundary/driver delta vs base) and is therefore EXONERATED: it did not introduce the blow-up. Coupled-confirmation via this harness on this case is INFEASIBLE; savepoint-level evidence is the fallback.

method: d02 CPU-WRF boundary-replay GPU coupled forecast (init from CPU-WRF wrfout t0, CPU-WRF hourly side-history as LBC), scored vs CPU-WRF wrfout.
